data.body: Implemented: fsck configured-vs-mounted branch-mismatch WARN + dir-mismatch hint (configured=precedence-resolved, mounted=worktree checked-out branch). New hermetic e2e tests: defaults regression, custom dir+branch init creating/mounting/gitignoring with a real write+SYNC round-trip (push from clone A -> mount in clone B -> ticket visible), and both fsck mismatch checks; all run under 'not integration'. Subagent review clean (threaded repo_root for exactness; tightened the hint assertion). During final full-suite verification, found+fixed a config-cache regression the epic's early load_config calls exposed (a config appearing where none was discovered was missed) — also fixes latent MCP staleness. Full suite: 2949 passed, only the pre-existing unrelated test_external_isolation (grounding) fails.
